final_prompt.prompt:
Create a brand color + secondary color + typography specification sheet for "染秋 (RAN QIU)" autumn fragrance brand.

Style/medium: needs a "东方哲学" and "染秋" aesthetic — references in the spirit of 新中式 brand identity movement, 原研哉 / MUJI minimalist heritage, 故宫文创 contemporary palette work; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a specification sheet layout with three distinct zones: primary color swatch, secondary color swatch, typography specimen
Subject: must include the brand name "染秋 (RAN QIU)" as the focal identity element
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs a warm autumn atmosphere — exact light treatment is yours
Color palette: must include autumn-inspired tones reflecting 桂花, 柿子, 枫叶, 乌龙茶, 肉桂, 檀香, 琥珀; exact hex values are yours
Materials/textures: needs a refined surface treatment suggesting "染" craft heritage — exact paper/ink texture is yours
Text (verbatim): must include "染秋", "RAN QIU", "桂花乌龙", "琥珀枫叶", "柿霜暮色"
Constraints: must preserve three-zone specification structure (主色 / 辅色 / 字体规范), all brand elements visible
Avoid:
